title: Loren (noble)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Leia_as_Loren.jpg]] |name=Loren
{{C|Leia Organa depicted disguised as Loren}} |homeworld=[[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |birth= |death=[[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], [[Tantajoc V]]{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030306velmor|text=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion|int=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] '''Loren''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the consort of crown [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Denid]] of [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Loren was betrothed to Denid in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], when Imperial agents stirred up a [[Great Revolt|revolt]] aimed at putting Denid's Imperial-friendly younger brother [[Anod]] on the throne. Denid and Loren escaped in a poorly equipped escape craft through the bravery of royal advisor [[Jedidiah]], only for their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to crash on the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Tantajoc V]]. Loren [[Death/Legends|died]] in the crash, but Denid and Jedidiah went on to survive for the next two decades in the harsh, wild environment of their new world. When Denid returned to Velmor to claim his crown in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], one of his rescuers—[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]—donned a [[Color/Legends|blonde]] wig and posed as Loren in order to conceal Rebel involvement in the succession crisis. ==Behind the scenes== Loren first appeared in a flashback in [[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]], written by [[Mike W. Barr]] and released in [[1981]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 49}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030306velmor|text=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion|int=Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Velmorians]]
